summary: Comprehensive testing of PortfolioHealth Advisor comprehensive update. Backend: 25/26 tests passed (96%). Frontend: All critical flows verified. Token-based auth (Bearer) working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 'Failed to start assessment' - EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not configured in backend/.env
minor.note: LLM integration requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable

passed_tests: API health check - returns healthy status
Admin login with admin@ppdt.com / Admin123! - Bearer token returned and stored in localStorage
Register new user - creates account with consultant role
Duplicate email registration rejected with 400
Bearer token authentication via /auth/me endpoint
Unauthenticated requests rejected with 401
Create company - returns company with ID
Get companies - returns list with assessment_count, completed_count, latest_score fields
Delete company - removes company and associated assessments
Delete non-existent company returns 404
Create assessment - returns assessment with in_progress status
Get assessments list
Get notifications list
Get unread notification count
Mark all notifications as read
Admin: Get all assessments across users
Admin: Get all quick assessments
Admin: Get global stats
Admin: Export assessments CSV
Quick assessment: Get 15 questions
Quick assessment: Submit and get scores with traffic lights
Quick assessment: PDF generation (701KB)
Dashboard stats endpoint
Frontend: Landing page loads with Quick Check CTA
Frontend: Login flow with Bearer token stored in localStorage
Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats, sidebar nav, notification bell
Frontend: Companies page - Add company dialog works
Frontend: Companies page - Three-dot action menu (Download, View Assessments, Delete)
Frontend: Companies page - Delete confirmation dialog works
Frontend: Quick Assessment - Complete 15-question flow to results
Frontend: Notification bell shows unread count, dropdown opens
Frontend: Admin page accessible at /admin with global stats and data tables
action_items: CRITICAL: Add EMERGENT_LLM_KEY to /app/backend/.env for LLM integration to work (assessment chat/start endpoints)
critical_code_review_comments: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable is missing from backend/.env - this breaks the AI chat functionality
The backend correctly uses emergentintegrations.llm.chat for Claude integration (not anthropic directly)
Bearer token auth is properly implemented with localStorage storage and axios interceptor
seed_data_creation: Created test companies and quick assessments during testing (cleaned up TEST_ prefixed data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working except LLM-dependent endpoints (assessment start/chat). The EMERGENT_LLM_KEY needs to be added to backend/.env. Token-based auth (Bearer) is working correctly - tokens stored in localStorage and sent via Authorization header. Companies page has new action menu with Delete functionality. Admin page shows global stats across all users. Notification bell shows unread count and dropdown.

features_verified.bearer_token_auth: Working - token stored in localStorage, axios interceptor adds Authorization header
features_verified.company_delete: Working - DELETE /api/companies/{id} removes company and assessments
features_verified.company_action_menu: Working - Three-dot menu with Download, View Assessments, Delete options
features_verified.delete_confirmation_dialog: Working - Shows company name and warning before delete
features_verified.notification_bell: Working - Shows unread count badge, dropdown with notifications
features_verified.admin_page: Working - Shows global stats, full/quick assessments tables, export CSV
features_verified.quick_assessment_flow: Working - 15 questions, results with radar chart and scores
features_verified.pdf_generation: Working - Quick assessment PDF generates correctly (701KB)

missing_configuration.EMERGENT_LLM_KEY: Required for LLM integration - not present in backend/.env
